payment_terms: 30 days from Customer's receipt of invoice
services_description: Provider will design, develop, and deploy a custom data analytics dashboard including data pipeline integration, user interface design, and automated reporting features
provider_covered_claims_detail: (a) the Deliverables, when used by Customer according to the terms, violate or infringe upon intellectual property rights; (b) Provider's employees are deemed Customer's employees; or (c) arises out of Provider's gross negligence or willful misconduct
customer_covered_claims_detail: (a) Customer Materials, when used by Provider according to the terms, violate or infringe upon intellectual property rights; or (b) arises out of Customer's gross negligence or willful misconduct
dpa_description: Data Processing Agreement available at https://techco.com/dpa, incorporated by reference
sow_changes_to_standard_terms: Section 2.1 is modified to require weekly status reports for this SOW
changes_to_standard_terms: Section 8.2 is modified to extend the non-solicitation period to 24 months
fee_description: $150 per hour for senior consultants, $100 per hour for junior consultants, plus pass-through charges for third-party tools
invoice_cadence: Monthly, within 5 business days of each month end
customer_obligations: Customer will designate a single point of contact and provide access to required systems within 5 business days of request
increased_claim_other_detail: Claims arising from unauthorized sharing or disclosure of customer data
unlimited_claim_other_detail: Claims arising from intentional misuse of the other party's intellectual property
additional_warranty_provider_detail: Provider warrants all deliverables are free of known security vulnerabilities at the time of delivery
additional_warranty_customer_detail: Customer warrants all materials provided are authorized for use in the project
jurisdiction: courts located in New Castle County, Delaware
travel_expense_policy: All travel requires prior written approval; reimbursement per Provider's standard travel policy
customer_owned_deliverables: Custom API integrations, data migration scripts, and training documentation
